sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this NES platformer

special_mechanics.name: Spellcasting
special_mechanics.description: Player character performs spellcasting animation with pointing gesture; unused 'Raise the roof' pose exists in graphics but is not implemented in final game

tier_notes: Tier 3: No movement physics data documented in available sources. Game is a Mega-Man-style action platformer with spellcasting mechanics, but detailed movement parameters, gravity, jump physics, and sub-pixel system information are not documented in The Cutting Room Floor wiki entry.
sources_used: tcrf: Totally Rad - The Cutting Room Floor
